MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CERTAINTEED CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

Appearances:
Laurel Simes of Levin Simes Kaiser & Gornick (646.7162) for plaintiff and responding party
Daniel Hoye of McKenna Long & Aldridge (267.4055) for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. Defendant shifts the burden of producing evidence based on factually devoid discovery. Plaintiff lacks evidence that the off-loaded product was actually shipped to defendant and defendant cannot be liable for this product until defendant receives it. Until that time, defendant is not a manufacturer, distributor or supplier. Plaintiff's counsel is advised that henceforth any brief in excess of the page limit, the excess pages will not be considered. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. The Court will rule on counsel's objections. (302/PJM/AY) Judge: Patrick Mahoney; Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR #2542
